subject: Add NBI Frankfurt features to gating test
commit_message:
Add NBI Frankfurt features to gating test

Issue-ID: EXTAPI-413

Signed-off-by: aosull01 <adrian.osullivan@huawei.com>
Change-Id: I962409c449ea8ba14327e3102c0085311bb1800a

entries.message: Uploaded patch set 1.

Patch Set 1:

Gitlab controller: Deployment put on queue, number 1 on the queue.

Patch Set 1:

Gitlab Orange 2: Chained-CI build started, max time: 14400 seconds

Patch Set 1:

Build Started https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-verify-helm/3929/

Patch Set 1: Verified-1

Build Failed 

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-verify-helm/3929/ : FAILURE

No problems were identified. If you know why this problem occurred, please add a suitable Cause for it. ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-verify-helm/3929/ )

Logs: https://logs.onap.org/production/vex-yul-ecomp-jenkins-1/oom-master-verify-helm/3929

Patch Set 1:

Bumping NBI to 6.0.0, testing 6.0.0-latest can pass Gating,

Patch Set 1:

While commiting please use new lines separation between description, issue id and signed off. It avoid situation of all those info in commit message

Patch Set 1:

> Patch Set 1:
> 
> While commiting please use new lines separation between description, issue id and signed off. It avoid situation of all those info in commit message

Thanks, Should I git commit --amend and resubmit the patchset, or if this information for future reference?. Also when does Gating Chain get triggered, does it take some time based on some queue?

Patch Set 1:

> Patch Set 1:
> 
> > Patch Set 1:
> >

Wait for the next patchset for the amend ;)
